directives:
- hideField:
    field: parent
- hideAtom:
    selector: '{ x : RBNode | (x.key in NoneType) } + RBTree + int + NoneType + {s
      : str | @:s = red or @:s = black}'
- attribute:
    field: color
- attribute:
    field: key
- atomColor:
    selector: '{ x : RBNode | @:(x.color) = black }'
    value: black
- atomColor:
    selector: '{ x : RBNode | @:(x.color) = red }'
    value: red
